mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_private_order_coupon_rel (order_id, coupon_id, member_coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_type, discount_amount) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{couponId}, #{memberCouponId}, #{couponName}, #{couponType}, #{discountAmount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, coupon_id, member_coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_type, discount_amount, created_at FROM pt_private_order_coupon_rel WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, coupon_id AS couponId, coupon_name AS couponName, coupon_type AS couponType FROM mk_member_coupon WHERE id = #{memberCouponId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND use_status = 0 AND expire_time > NOW() LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_member_coupon SET use_status = 1, used_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{memberCouponId} AND use_status = 3 AND used_order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE mk_member_coupon SET use_status = 0, used_order_id = NULL WHERE id = #{memberCouponId} AND use_status = 3 AND used_order_id = #{orderId}
